test-method.name: deleteUser
test-method.description: TC04: Delete an existing User by ID

test-method.name: getUserByInvalidId
test-method.description: TC05: Get User with non-existing ID (404)

test-method.name: createUserWithInvalidData
test-method.description: TC06: Create User with invalid data format (400)

exception.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <400> but was <500>.
exception.full-stacktrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <400> but was <500>.
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method) at test-method.name: getProtectedResource
test-method.description: TC07: Access protected resource without token

exception.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <401> but was <200>.
exception.full-stacktrace:
